case_title: FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA VS. JULIO MARTINEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JULIO DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4005 MISSION STREET, #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
